title: Accepting Bitcoin for Ebook Sales: A Step-by-Step Setup Guide
author: Unchained Commerce
excerpt: Selling ebooks, courses, templates, fonts, and digital downloads with automated delivery and crypto payments — no platform middleman required.

content.text: Are you an ebook author from Nigeria or Kenya, unable to sell your digital creations through PayPal or Stripe due to geographic restrictions? Or perhaps you're a solo developer in Iran or Venezuela, struggling to find a payment gateway that accepts cryptocurrency? This guide will help you set up a system to accept Bitcoin for ebook sales, bypassing the limitations of mainstream platforms and embracing the power of crypto-native commerce.
Why This Method Works When Everything Else Fails

This method works because it's built on top of NOWPayments, a cutting-edge payment processor that doesn't require KYC or buyer accounts, allowing you to accept 300+ coins, including Bitcoin, Ethereum, and many more. By integrating Web3 Wallet Connect ($19.99) into your store, you can generate multi-chain QR codes and live price feeds, making it seamless for buyers to pay in their preferred cryptocurrency. Plus, our automated delivery system ensures that customers receive their ebooks instantly after payment, eliminating the need for manual intervention.
What You Need Before You Start

Before you begin, ensure you have an ebook ready for sale, a digital product store set up on Unchained Commerce's Shop Engine (https://unchained-commerce.github.io/Shop/index.html), and a valid NOWPayments account. You'll also need to install Web3 Wallet Connect ($19.99) on your store to enable cryptocurrency payments. Lastly, make sure you have a clear description of your ebook, including its title, price, and any relevant metadata.
Setting Up Your Payment and Delivery Pipeline

To set up your payment and delivery pipeline, navigate to your Unchained Commerce store, and integrate Web3 Wallet Connect ($19.99) by following the on-screen instructions. Set up your NOWPayments account and link it to your store, configuring the payment settings to accept your desired cryptocurrencies. For delivery, configure the automated delivery system to send your ebook to customers immediately after payment, ensuring a seamless experience.
By embracing cryptocurrency payments, you can tap into a global market of eager buyers who are eager to support creators like you.
Going Live and Making Your First Sale

Once your setup is complete, go live with your ebook sale by promoting it through your social media channels, email list, or other marketing strategies. When a customer makes a payment, they'll receive their ebook instantly, and you'll be notified of the sale through your Unchained Commerce dashboard. To track your sales and revenue, use the Admin Dashboard ($29.99) to analyze your performance and optimize your strategy for future growth.
Scaling Once the System Is Running

As your ebook sales grow, consider upgrading to our Full Stack Bundle ($79.99) to leverage priority updates, Discord support, and a deployment guide to help you scale your business further. With our automated delivery system and Web3 Wallet Connect ($19.99), you can focus on creating more ebooks and marketing your store, while our system handles the payment and delivery logistics.
How do I sell an ebook online without PayPal?

The fastest path to your first crypto-native digital product sale is a three-step process. First, set up NOWPayments — create an account, configure your wallet address, get your API key. Second, deploy the Core Shop Engine with your product file and NOWPayments credentials. Third, configure Web3 Wallet Connect with your checkout settings and product details. At that point, your store accepts crypto payments and delivers the product automatically. The complete setup, following the included deployment guide, takes most creators two to four hours from start to first test transaction. The Full Stack Bundle at $79.99 includes all three components plus the deployment guide and support access. For a creator who cannot use PayPal or Stripe, this is the infrastructure that makes selling digital products viable.
Our automated delivery system ensures that customers receive their ebooks instantly after payment, eliminating the need for manual intervention and reducing the risk of lost sales.
Related: How Creators Like You Are Getting Paid

If you're looking to sell digital downloads without fees, consider using Unchained Commerce's Shop Engine, which integrates with NOWPayments to accept cryptocurrency payments. To take your store to the next level, upgrade to our Full Stack Bundle ($79.99) and leverage our priority updates, Discord support, and deployment guide. Our Web3 Wallet Connect ($19.99) plugin allows you to generate multi-chain QR codes and live price feeds, making it easy for buyers to pay in their preferred cryptocurrency. Visit https://unchained-commerce.github.io/Shop/index.html to get started.
Your Action Checklist

To set up your ebook sale, follow these steps: Create a digital product store on Unchained Commerce's Shop Engine; Integrate Web3 Wallet Connect ($19.99) to enable cryptocurrency payments; Configure your NOWPayments account to accept your desired cryptocurrencies; Set up automated delivery to send your ebook to customers instantly after payment; Promote your ebook sale through social media, email, or other marketing channels; Analyze your sales and revenue using the Admin Dashboard ($29.99) and optimize your strategy for future growth.
With NOWPayments and Unchained Commerce's Shop Engine, you can accept 300+ cryptocurrencies, giving you the flexibility to adapt to changing market trends and customer preferences.
Web3 Wallet Connect — $19.99. Frontend wallet integration with multi-chain QR generation and live price feeds. Let buyers pay in BTC, ETH, USDT, SOL, and 300 more coins.
